meta.compliance_deadline_basis: All other institutions: 24 months from issuance

executive_summary.lead: Johndup, a small standalone DMB with limited AML infrastructure, faces significant gaps in AML systems, governance, and policies, risking non-compliance.
body_paragraphs: The CBN issued the AML/CFT Baseline Standards in 2026, requiring institutions to implement automated AML systems, comprehensive policies, and governance frameworks. Johndup's scope is limited, with manual processes across all standards.
Assessment shows critical gaps: no automated systems, governance, or policies. Only 1 of 12 standards is compliant. System status is manual, governance is absent, and risk management is minimal.
Urgent action is needed before the 10 June 2026 roadmap deadline. OPEX supports include policy drafting, vendor evaluation, and staff training to accelerate compliance.
executive_summary.inline_alert: CBN mandates that all DMBs must establish automated AML systems and governance frameworks to ensure effective compliance and risk mitigation.

overall_rating.sector_context_note: Johndup's manual AML processes and governance gaps expose it to severe regulatory and operational risks.

scorecard.regulatory_context_box: CBN's AML standards require automated systems, governance, and policies; Johndup's manual processes pose compliance and operational risks.

profile.sector_context_box: Johndup is a small standalone DMB operating in a single state, with limited AML infrastructure and manual compliance processes, facing high regulatory risk.

requirement_categories_intro: This assessment covers all 12 AML standards and governance controls, highlighting critical gaps in systems, policies, and governance frameworks for Johndup.
requirement_categories_alert: Immediate implementation of automated AML systems, governance, and policies is essential to meet CBN standards and avoid severe penalties.

requirement_categories.trigger: Current manual CDD/KYC processes do not meet real-time or automated standards, risking non-compliance.
Manual sanctions screening against limited lists; no AI/ML or real-time screening capabilities.
Manual transaction monitoring; no real-time or automated system in place, risking detection failures.
Manual risk assessment with no dynamic scoring or automated risk scoring system.
No fraud monitoring system; risk factors include material fraud exposure, increasing operational risk.
Manual case management; no audit trail or automated workflow, risking non-compliance.
Manual reporting via goAML portal; no automated or fully documented approval process.
Audit not covered; no internal audit process for AML, risking oversight.
No AML governance framework or policies; governance gaps undermine compliance.
No encryption, MFA, or data sovereignty measures; system security is inadequate.
No AML training program; staff awareness is unestablished, risking non-compliance.
Roadmap not started; submission deadline is 10 June 2026, requiring immediate action.
No governance controls in place; governance score is zero, risking severe non-compliance.

standards.title: Customer Due Diligence and KYC
standards.finding: Current manual CDD/KYC processes lack automation and real-time verification, risking non-compliance with CBN standards.
standards.required_action: Implement automated CDD/KYC processes with real-time verification before the roadmap submission deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Deploy RegPort for automated customer onboarding, verification, and risk assessment workflows.

standards.title: Sanctions & PEP Screening
standards.finding: Sanctions screening is manual against limited lists; no AI/ML or real-time screening, risking sanctions violations.
standards.required_action: Automate sanctions and PEP screening with AI/ML and real-time list updates before the deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Implement RegGuard for automated sanctions screening against comprehensive lists with real-time updates.

standards.title: Transaction Monitoring
standards.finding: Manual transaction monitoring with no real-time or network analysis; high risk of undetected suspicious activity.
standards.required_action: Deploy real-time transaction monitoring system with network analysis capabilities before the roadmap deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Use RegPort for real-time multi-scenario transaction monitoring and network analysis.

standards.title: Risk Assessment
standards.finding: Manual risk assessment with no dynamic scoring; unable to adapt to evolving risk profiles.
standards.required_action: Implement automated risk assessment with dynamic scoring and risk profiling tools before submission.
standards.regtech_solution: Leverage RegPort for automated risk scoring and customer risk profiling.

standards.title: Transaction Monitoring System
standards.finding: No automated transaction monitoring system; manual processes risk delayed detection of suspicious activities.
standards.required_action: Implement a full real-time transaction monitoring system via RegPort before the roadmap deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Deploy RegPort for comprehensive real-time transaction monitoring and alert management.

standards.title: Fraud Monitoring
standards.finding: No fraud monitoring system; risk factors include material fraud exposure, increasing operational vulnerabilities.
standards.required_action: Establish full fraud monitoring with real-time detection and risk feed before the deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Integrate RegGuard for fraud detection and risk feed management.

standards.title: Case Management & Audit Trail
standards.finding: Manual case management with no audit trail; risks non-compliance and loss of investigation integrity.
standards.required_action: Implement automated case management with audit trail features before the submission deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Use RegComply for case management and audit trail automation.

standards.title: Reporting & Suspicious Transaction Reports
standards.finding: Manual reporting via goAML portal; no automated or fully approved reporting process, risking delays.
standards.required_action: Automate suspicious transaction reporting with documented approval workflows before the deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Leverage RegComply for automated reporting and approval workflows.

standards.title: Internal Audit & Compliance
standards.finding: Audit not covered; no internal audit process for AML, risking oversight and non-compliance.
standards.required_action: Establish internal audit coverage with at least biannual reviews before the deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Support internal audit co-sourcing with RegLearn training modules.

standards.title: AML System Security & Data Sovereignty
standards.finding: No encryption, MFA, or data sovereignty measures; system security is inadequate for compliance.
standards.required_action: Implement full encryption, MFA, and ensure data sovereignty within Nigeria before submission.
standards.regtech_solution: Configure RegPort with full security features including MFA and data controls.

standards.title: BIA & Data Retention
standards.finding: No BIA or data retention policy; system security and compliance are at risk.
standards.required_action: Develop BIA and data retention policies aligned with AML requirements before the deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Use RegComply for policy documentation and data management.

standards.title: Staff Training & Awareness
standards.finding: No AML training program; staff awareness is unestablished, risking non-compliance and operational errors.
standards.required_action: Implement comprehensive AML training with records before the roadmap submission deadline.
standards.regtech_solution: Utilize RegLearn for staff training and compliance awareness modules.

standards.title: CBN Roadmap Submission
standards.finding: Roadmap not started; immediate action required to meet the 10 June 2026 deadline for compliance.
standards.required_action: Complete and submit the CBN AML implementation roadmap by 10 June 2026.
standards.regtech_solution: Support provided via AML policy drafting, vendor evaluation, and RegTech365 demo to accelerate submission.

governance_assessment.intro: Johndup's governance framework is absent, with no MLRO, policies, or governance controls, severely impairing AML compliance and oversight.
governance_assessment.score_context: Governance gaps undermine AML effectiveness, risking regulatory sanctions and operational vulnerabilities. Immediate governance framework establishment is critical.

items.action_required: Appoint a qualified MLRO or CCO and document the appointment immediately.
Draft and obtain board approval for AML/CFT/CPF policy before the roadmap deadline.
Develop and document AML governance framework aligned with standards.

items.control: Formal Change Control for AML Configurations
items.action_required: Establish change control procedures for AML system configurations immediately.
Implement model governance for AI/ML once systems are in place.
Define and document alert review SLAs before system deployment.
Draft vendor management policy aligned with AML vendor evaluation support.
Develop data retention and destruction policy aligned with AML requirements.
Achieve real-time BVN/NIN integration for automated KYC verification.
Implement AML training program with documented records before submission deadline.

priority_actions.title: CBN Roadmap Submission
priority_actions.deadline_label: HARD DEADLINE: 10 JUNE 2026 · MANDATORY FOR ALL INSTITUTIONS
priority_actions.body: Johndup must complete and submit the AML implementation roadmap by 10 June 2026 to ensure compliance. Immediate focus on governance, policies, and system deployment is essential. OPEX supports include policy drafting, vendor evaluation, and AML system demos to accelerate progress and meet deadlines.

priority_actions.title: AML Governance Framework
priority_actions.body: Establish a formal AML governance framework, appoint MLRO, and draft policies to meet CBN standards. This foundational step is critical for compliance and operational integrity. OPEX provides policy drafting and governance advisory support.

priority_actions.title: Automated Customer Verification
priority_actions.body: Implement real-time BVN/NIN integration and automate CDD/KYC processes to meet CBN standards. This reduces manual errors and enhances compliance. Support includes vendor evaluation and RegPort deployment.

priority_actions.title: System Security & Data Policies
priority_actions.body: Develop and implement data retention, encryption, MFA, and data sovereignty policies. These are essential for AML system security and compliance. RegPort configuration supports these security measures.

priority_actions.title: Staff AML Training
priority_actions.body: Deploy comprehensive AML training modules via RegLearn, ensuring staff awareness and compliance readiness. Training records are mandatory for audit and compliance verification.

roadmap.intro: Johndup's AML roadmap must address governance, system deployment, policy development, and staff training to meet the 10 June 2026 deadline.

phases.title: Foundation & Submission
phases.description: Establish governance, draft policies, implement initial systems, and prepare the submission. Focus on governance, policy drafting, and vendor evaluation.
phases.standards_addressed: Governance, policies, vendor management, and initial system deployment.

phases.title: Governance & Architecture
phases.description: Finalize governance, design system architecture, and complete policy documentation. Prepare for system deployment and staff training.
phases.standards_addressed: Full governance, policies, and system design.

phases.title: System Deployment
phases.description: Deploy AML systems, integrate security features, and test real-time functionalities. Ensure staff are trained and policies are operational.
phases.standards_addressed: System deployment, security, and staff readiness.

phases.title: Assurance & Examination Readiness
phases.description: Conduct internal audits, validate AI/ML models, and prepare evidence pack. Achieve full compliance before the regulatory deadline.
phases.standards_addressed: Audit readiness, AI governance, and compliance validation.

support_section.intro_paragraph: Johndup benefits from comprehensive support including policy drafting, vendor evaluation, AML system demos, and staff training, facilitated by RegTech365 and CBN advisory.
support_section.differentiator: RegTech365 offers tailored solutions for small banks like Johndup, combining automation, security, and compliance training to accelerate AML readiness.

products.name: RegPort
products.tagline: Integrated AML Platform for CBN Baseline Standards Compliance
products.description: RegPort unifies CDD/KYC, sanctions/PEP screening, transaction monitoring, customer risk assessment, and regulatory reporting in a single platform. The platform is purpose-built for Nigerian financial institutions, featuring real-time BVN/NIN integration via NIBSS, automated goAML/NFIU filing, and AI-enabled fuzzy matching for international sanctions lists.

products.name: RegGuard
products.tagline: Real-Time Fraud Monitoring with Bidirectional Risk Feed
products.description: RegGuard provides real-time fraud monitoring for card issuance, mobile money, and agent network channels. It detects pattern-based fraud like SIM swap attacks and account takeover, with an automated feed that pushes fraud alerts directly into customer risk scores to identify money laundering disguised as fraud.

products.name: RegComply
products.tagline: Enterprise Case Management with Immutable Audit Trails
products.description: RegComply delivers the mandatory Case Management and Governance Audit layer. It enforces Maker-Checker workflows for investigation, provides role-based access for MLROs, and maintains tamper-proof audit logs of all configuration changes and alert dispositions required for CBN examination.

products.name: RegLearn
products.tagline: AML Training Programme with Documented Records
products.description: RegLearn provides role-specific AML/CFT/CPF training modules covering the 12 Baseline Standards. The platform tracks staff completion, assessment scores, and certification status, producing the documented training records specifically mandated under Section 6.7 of the Circular.

advisory_services.title: CBN Roadmap Template completion
advisory_services.description: End-to-end support in completing and validating the mandatory 12-section roadmap for June 10th submission.

advisory_services.title: AML/CFT/CPF policy drafting
advisory_services.description: Development of Board-approved policies aligned with the new 2026 Baseline Standards and ISO 42001.

advisory_services.title: MLRO appointment advisory
advisory_services.description: Guidance on role definition, reporting lines, and CBN notification for newly appointed MLROs.

advisory_services.title: Evidence pack preparation
advisory_services.description: Compilation of all technical and governance documentation into an audit-ready format for CBN examination.

advisory_services.title: ISO 27001 and 42001 alignment
advisory_services.description: Gap analysis and implementation support for international security and AI governance standards.

advisory_services.title: Vendor due diligence
advisory_services.description: Structured evaluation of RegTech platform providers against CBN technical requirements.

advisory_services.title: Governance framework drafting
advisory_services.description: Drafting of AML Solution Governance, Change Control, and Data Retention policies.

cta.title: Accelerate Your AML Compliance Journey
cta.subtitle: Partner with RegTech365 for tailored AML solutions, policy drafting, and staff training to meet CBN standards efficiently.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on Circular BSD/DIR/PUB/LAB/019/002 and self-assessment data. It is advisory-only; compliance actions are the responsibility of Johndup.
